# Dreative executable native foundations

Search the small machine-readable system set after selecting an advanced need:

    dreative catalogue --query "persistent product" --json

The catalogue deliberately contains twelve systems rather than a vocabulary of
effects. Each record links executable source, a functional visual fixture,
appropriate and bad uses, mobile/reduced-motion behavior, cleanup, a performance
budget, and browser checks.

The compiled registry is `dist/shared/creativeCatalog.js`. Source and examples
are in `systems/runtime.js`, `systems/NATIVE_FOUNDATIONS.md`, and
`systems/demo.html`. Advanced runtime selection is in
`references/CREATIVE_EXECUTION.md`; build-time media work is in
`references/ASSET_PIPELINES.md`. The system set is an implementation lookup
after a project-native concept has been chosen. It must never supply the concept
or a named site's house style.
